configurations.name: salesforce-mcp
configurations.note: Stdio MCP server. Port 8080 is used temporarily for Salesforce OAuth callbacks only.

configurations.name: salesforce-remote
configurations.note: Remote MCP proxy — forwards stdio calls to Cloudflare Worker. Reads SF_MCP_SECRET from .env.local. Use this in remote/mobile sessions instead of salesforce-mcp.

configurations.name: retool-mcp
configurations.note: Stdio MCP server. No HTTP port — communicates over stdin/stdout.
